chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1099 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 5465/2020 (urgent application) 2. For orders on office objections appearing on reverse of memo of petition. 3. For orders on M.A 5466/2020 (exemption application) 4. For hearing of main case 13.10.2020 Mr. Arif Ali Bhatti, advocate for petitioners. ----- There are questions of facts involved in this petition as respondents No.1 and 2 are being held as encroachers by the petitioners and have prayed for their removal. Such questions cannot be probed as far as the entitlement and disentitlement of the parties are concerned. Petitioners may pursue their remedy available to them under the law. Petition is dismissed along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
